calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-05-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-05-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Arnold Evje, Esq. for Plaintiff: Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Walt Penn, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Ronald Pavlak.
Exhibit 1 - Three-day Notice-------------------ID/EVID
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Ronald Pavlak as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the property located at 405 Valencia St., #209, San Francisco.
Back-Rent and Damages $1,483.76
Costs $195.00, for a total of $1,678.76
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.
